ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello John Doe,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! This email confirms your recent order placed on 07 April 2026. Your order has been successfully processed and is now ready for shipment.

Order Summary:
• 1× Wireless Bluetooth Headphones – $59.99
• 2× USB-C Charging Cable – $19.98
• 1× Portable Power Bank – $39.99
Total: $119.96

Estimated Delivery: 08 April 2026 – 04:30 PM

If you need to modify your shipping address or track the package, please log in to your Amazon account.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Investor,

We have detected irregular activity in your crypto wallet (Wallet ID: 0xABC123). In accordance with our latest security protocols, the wallet has been temporarily suspended to protect your assets from potential threats.

To regain access, please verify your identity by following the secure link below. Failure to do so within 24 hours may result in permanent suspension.

Click here to verify: <URL>

Your prompt action is essential to safeguard your investments.

Sincerely,
CoinSecure Security Team
